# cloudfly_instance_usage (Data Source)

Gets usage history for a CloudFly instance.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudfly_instance_usage" "example" {
  instance_id = cloudfly_instance.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) Instance ID.

### Read-Only

- `items` (String) Usage history items (JSON).
